transcript: Speaker A: kya kar rahe ho? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: I am sleeping. "I'm sleeping" bolna chahiye. Aur thoda formal bolna ho to "I'm getting some sleep" bhi keh sakte hain. [I am sleeping. You should say "I'm sleeping". And if you want to speak a bit more formally, you can also say "I'm getting some sleep".] Speaker A: Achha! Aisa hai kya? Main English kaise seekhu? [Oh! Is that so? How do I learn English?] Speaker B: Mere saath roz sirf 15 minutes practice karo. Ek mahine mein hi English seekh jaoge. [Practice with me for just 15 minutes every day. You will learn English in just one month.] Speaker A: Par yeh toh kaafi mehenga hoga na? [But this must be quite expensive, right?] Speaker B: Bilkul nahi. Sirf ek rupe mein poori app try kar sakte ho. [Not at all. You can try the whole app for just one rupee.] Speaker A: Fir join kaise karu? [Then how do I join?] Speaker B: 50 lakh se zyada log mere saath English seekh rahe hain. Abhi MySivi app download karo, English seekhna shuru kar do. [More than 50 lakh people are learning English with me. Download the MySivi app now and start learning English.] Speaker C: Install Now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]

summary: An AI avatar corrects a user's English in a split-screen setup, demonstrating the MySivi app. The ad highlights a 15-minute daily practice routine, a 3-day trial for ’1, and prompts viewers to download the app.
